calendar.matters:
Compromise Of Claim Of An Incompetent Person In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-19-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Compromise of Claim for an Incompetent Person hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Maureen McGoven, Esq. for Petitioner: Gretchen Cotter, present as Guardian at litem for: Brett Graham, an Incompetent Person, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $21,712.50
Medical Lien $148.14
Costs $1,785.69
A net balance of $31,103.67 shall be distributed directly to the Office of the Sacramento Public Guardian, as Conservator of the Person and Estate of Brett Graham. See scanned doc. for details of Order.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.

Compromise Of Claim Of Incompetent Person.
